overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player navigating a dystopian urban environment. The scene transitions from a paved city street with futuristic architecture and palm trees to an overgrown sandy area with abandoned vehicles, makeshift barriers, and NPCs, culminating at a distinctive yellow cylindrical building with a large red spherical structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with palm trees and guardrail

events.description: white truck drives past on the left side of the road moving away from camera
approaching transition from paved sidewalk to sandy dirt terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk next to a white metal guardrail, passing palm trees on the right

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving away down the asphalt road

entered.detail: distinctive yellow building with horizontal black stripes and a large red spherical metal structure on top
metal guardrail separating the sidewalk from the lower terrain
tall palm trees lining the right side of the sidewalk
modern glass and steel buildings with construction scaffolding and cranes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk in a futuristic dystopian city. The camera moves forward past palm trees and a white guardrail, with the distinctive yellow cylindrical building visible on the right. A white truck drives away on the road to the left, and modern buildings with construction cranes rise in the background under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban dirt path with large digital billboard

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete sidewalk to sand and dirt with dry bushes
character comes into view standing ahead near a wrecked vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking off the sidewalk onto sandy terrain, approaching a character standing near a wrecked blue car

notable_agents.action: character standing near a wrecked blue car on the right side of the path

entered.detail: large tilted digital screen displaying organic food advertisement with green text and imagery
abandoned blue sedan partially buried in sand and surrounded by bushes
overgrown desert vegetation and dry shrubs covering the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The camera moves off the paved sidewalk onto sandy, overgrown terrain. A large digital billboard displaying an organic food advertisement comes into view, tilted and weathered. The ground is covered with dry bushes and sand. A character stands near a wrecked blue car ahead, and the yellow building recedes into the background while construction cranes remain visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift checkpoint with sandbags and parked motorcycles

events.description: approaching armed character standing guard near sandbag barriers
passing through dense bushes into a more open area with scattered vehicles

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense vegetation past sandbag barriers and parked motorcycles, passing NPCs near the checkpoint

notable_agents.action: armed character standing guard near sandbag barrier and wrecked car
character crouching behind concrete barriers in the distance

entered.detail: stacked military sandbags forming a defensive position and checkpoint
two high-tech motorcycles with neon yellow accents parked on the dirt path
large angled concrete blocks blocking the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through dense dry bushes and past makeshift defensive positions with sandbags. Two futuristic motorcycles with yellow accents are parked near the path. Armed NPCs stand guard near the barriers and wrecked vehicles. The terrain is rough with scattered concrete blocks, and the yellow building becomes more prominent again on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy lot with wrecked vehicles approaching spherical structure

events.description: entering wide open sandy area with multiple scattered wrecked cars
slowing approach toward the large yellow building with red spherical structure

agents.ego_description: moving through open sandy terrain scattered with wrecked vehicles, approaching the distinctive spherical structure

entered.detail: multiple abandoned cars scattered across the sandy ground including an orange vehicle and several sedans
large red metal spherical framework attached to the yellow building resembling a ferris wheel cage

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide sandy area littered with multiple wrecked and abandoned vehicles. The camera approaches the distinctive yellow cylindrical building with its large red spherical metal structure. Futuristic skyscrapers with construction cranes dominate the background, and the terrain is mostly clear of vegetation except for sparse dry bushes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a clean, futuristic city sidewalk into a desolate, overgrown wasteland. It begins by moving past palm trees and a white guardrail under a clear blue sky, with a white truck driving away and a yellow cylindrical building visible in the distance. As the camera leaves the pavement, the environment shifts to sandy, overgrown terrain featuring a weathered digital billboard and a wrecked blue car. The path then leads through dense dry bushes and past makeshift sandbag barriers guarded by armed NPCs and parked futuristic motorcycles, while the yellow building grows more prominent on the right. Finally, the scene opens into a wide sandy expanse littered with abandoned vehicles, culminating in a close approach to the yellow cylindrical building and its large red spherical structure against a backdrop of towering skyscrapers and construction cranes.
